bead.title: Stage 4.5: Beads detail panel
bead.description: Create src/lib/components/BeadDetail.svelte. Row-click opens side panel with full bead metadata + dependencies + history. URL becomes .../beads/:beadId. Closing panel returns to list. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 4 bead #39.
bead.acceptance: (1) MANUAL: click a bead row, panel opens with full bead data matching `ddx bead show <id>`. (2) URL becomes .../beads/<id>. (3) Close button returns to list. (4) Direct URL load to .../beads/<id> opens the panel.
